author: Maxime Janton
subject: Feat/hash website assets (algolia/react-instantsearch#2051)
body:
* chore: add `hasha` and `replace-in-file` deps

* feat(hash-website-assets): util to add hash on build files

* feat(hash-website-assets): include `revAssets()` script to build

* fix(rev-assets): dont write modify files with concurrency

* feat(revAssets): compute in right order

* refactor(revAssets): duplicated logic

* feat(revAssets): compute examples assets

* refactor(revAssets): use tupple as `computeFiles` argument

* feat(revAssets): disable hash from webpack

* perf(revAssets): compute all the files 🚀
